scripts.catalog:build: npm run content:build && npm run catalog:publish
scripts.prebuild: npm run version:sync && npm run catalog:build
scripts.build:mobile: npm run version:sync && npm run catalog:build && node scripts/build-mobile-export.mjs
scripts.build:cf: npm run version:sync && npm run catalog:build && opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.android:prepare: npm run version:sync && npm run catalog:build && npm run android:assets
scripts.android:ci: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android testDebugUnitTest assembleDebug
scripts.android:run: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android installDebug
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release:apk: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android assembleRelease
scripts.android:build:release:bundle: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android bundleRelease
scripts.android:build:play:apk: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android -PREQUIRE_RELEASE_SIGNING=true assembleRelease
scripts.android:build:play:bundle: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android -PREQUIRE_RELEASE_SIGNING=true bundleRelease
scripts.android:verify:play: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android -PREQUIRE_RELEASE_SIGNING=true testDebugUnitTest bundleRelease
scripts.android:play:publish:internal: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android -PREQUIRE_RELEASE_SIGNING=true testDebugUnitTest publishReleaseBundle --track internal
scripts.android:play:publish:open: npm run android:prepare && node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android -PREQUIRE_RELEASE_SIGNING=true testDebugUnitTest publishReleaseBundle --track beta
scripts.android:play:promote:open: node scripts/with-android-java.mjs ./android/gradlew -p android promoteReleaseArtifact --from-track internal --promote-track beta
scripts.ios:prepare: npm run version:sync && npm run catalog:build && npm run apple:assets
scripts.ios:destinations: node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -showdestinations -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary"
scripts.ios:ci: npm run ios:prepare && node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary" -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build && node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary Watch" -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=watchOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:build:device: npm run ios:prepare && node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary" -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:build:sim: npm run ios:prepare && node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary" -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.watch:build:device: npm run ios:prepare && node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary Watch" -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=watchOS" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.watch:build:sim: npm run ios:prepare && node scripts/with-xcode.mjs xcodebuild -project "ios/App/The Devil's AI Dictionary.xcodeproj" -scheme "The Devil's AI Dictionary Watch" -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=watchOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.verify:ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build:mobile && npm run android:test
